infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used for barcode scanning when receiving inventory and looking up menu items.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used for voice inventory counting — speak ingredient quantities hands-free.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Used to recognise spoken ingredient quantities during voice inventory counts.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Restaurant Ops to access the camera for barcode scanning.
